title: 9 teas to ease orphan's sorrow
description: Ginkgo biloba teas have been traditionally used to help with grief, and research suggests that it may be beneficial in reducing symptoms of depression and anxiety associated with loss. The leaves of the Ginkgo biloba tree contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and bilobalide, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic effects. The flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, while the terpenoids may help to regulate mood by aff...
